generated_oml:
instance InternalTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (Internal 1)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (Internal 2)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (External)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor1, InternalTempSensor2, ExternalTempSensor
]

instance TemperatureSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQEnabler, ScipyOptimizerEnabler
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed actuator controlled via PCB with MOSFETs for 4A current handling"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan actuator controlled via PCB with optocouplers for signal isolation"
]

instance RaspberryPi : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for heating and control components"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume) housing thermal incubator system"
    base:contains InternalTempSensor1, InternalTempSensor2, ExternalTempSensor, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, RaspberryPi, PowerSupply
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic energy flow model for air and environment heat transfer with two parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizerEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic energy flow model including heatbed thermal inertia with four parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizerEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data ingestion and distribution"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ScipyOptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization library for model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine for thermal behavior prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance RaspberryPiEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B executing bang-bang control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance GitHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source code and community improvements"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelRefinementService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of temperature sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureMonitoringInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of thermal models using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterAdjustmentInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and prediction of thermal behavior using calibrated energy flow models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalPredictionInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang controller maintaining temperature within LL and UL bounds using sensor feedback"
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatingAction, WaitingAction
]

instance ModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Iterative refinement of models through community-driven improvements"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelRefinementInsight
]

instance TemperatureMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data for system monitoring"
]

instance ModelParameterAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized model parameters from calibration process"
]

instance ThermalPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted thermal behavior based on energy models"
]

instance HeatingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activate heatbed to increase temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance WaitingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Deactivate heating and wait for cooling"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model improvements from community contributions"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan activation) generated by the controller are transmitted via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which interfaces with hardware actuators."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system where RabbitMQ facilitates communication between physical components (sensors/actuators), low-level driver, controller, and simulation models, with data flow visualized in Figure 7 of the document."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, as the digital twin integrates with the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumptions (e.g., uniform temperature) tested experimentally; residual error minimized via parameter calibration; temperature discrepancies measured up to 7°C before optimization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for bidirectional data exchange between physical components and digital twin components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted entirely on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with RabbitMQ server and all digital twin components running locally on the device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol in low-level driver for device safety, with optocouplers providing electrical isolation between control signals and high-current driving circuits for heatbed."
]
